title: Dua of Yunus
summary: The supplication of Yunus in darkness and distress, carried by tawhid and repentance.
repeat_guidance: No fixed repetition count is attached in this entry.

supplications.arabic: لَّا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنتَ سُبْحَٰنَكَ إِنِّى كُنتُ مِنَ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ
supplications.transliteration: La ilaha illa anta subhanaka inni kuntu min al-zalimin.
supplications.translation: There is no deity except You; exalted are You. Indeed, I have been of the wrongdoers.
